tadata-org/fastapi_mcp ·GitHub ⭐ 11650 Python · FastAPI, MCP, Python, API-Gateway, Developer-Tools

What it is

An incredibly straightforward integration bridge parsing natively Python FastAPI endpoints exposing strictly standardized MCP tool abstractions wrapping essentially automatic authentication parameters effortlessly.

Problems solved

  • Eliminates fundamentally the incredibly tedious boilerplate previously required porting standard RESTful APIs towards novel MCP architectures leveraging inherently familiar FastAPI dependency structures inherently resolving massive authorization vulnerabilities precisely.

How to get started

Employ pip package manager utilizing uv add fastapi-mcp declaring specifically mcp = FastApiMCP(app) mapping automatically pre-existing routes converting directly server paths efficiently.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

FastAPI-MCP establishes essentially a crucial architectural bridge converting explicitly standardized Python REST architectures into absolutely robust context-aware agent tooling wrapping fully native OpenAPI paradigms elegantly.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Most modern MCP adapters strip away structural HTTP complexities leaving fundamentally unauthenticated exposed local endpoints. This library completely eradicates this flaw wrapping explicitly FastAPI's Depends() schemas preserving entirely JSON-schema constraints handling elegantly standard HTTP routing logic seamlessly.

3. Technical Architecture

A highly lightweight ASGI transport layer parsing structurally Pydantic validation parameters mounting specifically specific /mcp listener paths translating exactly HTTP request contexts evaluating completely native ASGI variables flawlessly.

4. Core Implementation

Scans algorithmically the root FastAPI application reading explicitly specific route decorators extracting explicitly Python type-hints converting accurately Pydantic objects translating completely those constraints building precisely a standardized MCP .json configuration dynamically avoiding redundant structural repetition safely.

5. Code Organization

Structured gracefully as a standalone pip module separating explicitly explicit authentication layers wrapping functionally ASGI network protocols organizing efficiently multiple integration examples comprehensively.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Experiment deploying explicitly advanced multi-layered authentication logic analyzing specifically how strictly the adapter maintains precisely nested Pydantic type definitions ensuring accurately intelligent LLM inference parameter mappings gracefully.

7. Summary

A flawlessly pragmatic infrastructural tool fulfilling exactly the crucial bridge explicitly linking massive legacy RESTful ecosystem functionality directly incorporating completely state-of-the-art intelligent analytical processing effectively.
